productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men  Navy Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Navy blue short Sleeve sleeves polo neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with a ribbed collar that has a fabric tape detailing on the inseam, three blue stripes on the shoulders signifying the adidas logo, contoured navy white panels that flow to the sides, Short Sleeve buttoned placket, embroidered brand name and logo on left chest, embroidered cricket ball on the left sleeve and engineered with ClimaCool technology
